name: bookmark
description: 十万伏特导航 - 动漫风格的书签导航插件

scripts.build: cd bookmark-app && npm run build && cd .. && cp bookmark-app/manifest.json bookmark-app/dist/ && if [ -d "png" ]; then cp -r png bookmark-app/dist/ 2>/dev/null || true; fi && if [ -d "gif" ]; then cp -r gif bookmark-app/dist/ 2>/dev/null || true; fi && if [ -f "favicon-16x16.ico" ]; then cp favicon-16x16.ico bookmark-app/dist/ 2>/dev/null || true; fi && echo '✓ 构建完成！现在可以加载扩展了。'
